## Decision 903: Fixture -- Decision-133-shaped stanza, future review_by -> not-due (Decided)

**Status:** Decided
**Date:** 2020-01-01

**Reversal conditions:**
This fixture mirrors the real Decision 133 stanza SHAPE (a kind: manual first condition with
only id/kind/description, plus kind: repo_state conditions carrying predicate: null) as a
schema regression fixture, independent of the real DECISIONS.md content. review_by is far in
the future -> not-due, and neither repo_state condition fires (predicate: null never auto-fires).

```yaml reversal-conditions
decision: 903
review_by: 2099-09-30
on_trigger: "re-decide sequencing via /plan; update or re-arm this stanza; never silently renew"
conditions:
  - id: manual-only-condition
    kind: manual
    description: "manual condition with only id/kind/description, like Decision 133's platform-mvp-closes"
  - id: repo-state-null-predicate
    kind: repo_state
    predicate: null
    params: {}
    description: "repo_state condition with predicate: null -- context only, never auto-fires"
  - id: repo-state-null-predicate-with-params
    kind: repo_state
    predicate: null
    params: {consecutive: 3}
    description: "repo_state condition with predicate: null and non-empty params -- still never auto-fires"
```
